body.title: Defer off-cloud/self-programming goals — cognition stability first + economics shift
body.text:
# D-goals-economics-reframe-2026-05-26
**title:** Defer off-cloud/self-programming goals — cognition stability first + economics shift
**date:** 2026-05-26
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** (none — goals update, no code change)

## Decision narrative
Four goals deferred: G-igor-self-programs (1.5), G-igor-brain-model (1.1), G-igor-small-compute (1.2),
G-igor-sentient (1.3). Self-programming deferred until Igor's cognition stabilizes (pe_chain, NE, memory
consolidation must run reliably first). Off-cloud/graph-matrix deferred because the economics that made
it urgent no longer apply — Claude API costs have dropped enough that staying with Claude for most work
is the cheaper, pragmatic path. These goals are not abandoned; they will return when the prerequisites
are met. The research interest in brain-modeled cognition remains; the survival urgency is gone.

## Hypothesis
N/A — no observable code change; this is a prioritization and context record.

## Goal Link
G-igor-self-programs (the deferred goal itself)

## Context
Original token-cost pressure drove the "escape from tokens" design goals (1.1, 1.2, graph matrix,
no-GPU). That pressure is now gone. Focus shifts to: cognition stability → reliable pe_chain →
observable self-improvement → THEN revisit self-programming if still warranted.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
